questions.question: When was NovaAI founded and who co-founded it?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaAI was founded in 2021 by Dr. Mara Chen and Lucas Ferreira.

questions.question: What is NovaAI's current valuation, and how was it achieved?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaAI reached a $1.4B valuation through its Series C round, which was completed in November 2025 and led by Horizon Ventures. Total funding stands at $210M.

questions.question: How many employees does NovaAI have and where are its offices?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaAI has 312 full-time employees as of Q1 2026. The company has offices in San Francisco, London (opened 2023), and Singapore (opened 2024).

questions.question: What are NovaAI's primary market verticals?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaAI's primary market verticals are financial services, healthcare, and logistics.

questions.question: Who is the CEO of NovaAI and when did she join the company?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Dr. Mara Chen is the CEO and co-founder of NovaAI. She joined in January 2021 when the company was founded and is based in San Francisco.

questions.question: Who leads the Engineering department and what are its sub-teams?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Sofia Andersson is the VP of Engineering. Engineering has four sub-teams: Platform Infrastructure (led by Raj Mehta), ML Systems (led by Dr. Yuki Tanaka), Product Engineering (led by Carlos Rivera), and Security Engineering (led by Ananya Bose).

questions.question: Who is NovaAI's General Counsel and what is their background?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Derek Shin is NovaAI's General Counsel. He joined the company in-house in May 2023 and previously worked at Cooley LLP. Legal is also overseen by CFO Priya Nambiar.

questions.question: What is Marcus Webb's role, location, and FY2026 quota?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Marcus Webb is the Enterprise Sales team lead. He is based in New York with an approved fully remote work arrangement. His FY2026 quota is $18M.

questions.question: What is the price of the NovaPilot Starter plan and what does it include?
questions.ground_truth_answer: The NovaPilot Starter plan costs $2,500/month. It includes up to 10 users and 50,000 automation runs per month.

questions.question: What is the price of the NovaPilot Growth plan?
questions.ground_truth_answer: The NovaPilot Growth plan costs $8,000/month. It supports up to 50 users, 500,000 automation runs per month, and includes audit logs.

questions.question: What features does NovaPilot Enterprise include and what is its price range?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaPilot Enterprise is priced at $30,000–$120,000/month. It includes unlimited users, a dedicated CSM, 99.95% SLA uptime, private cloud deployment on AWS or Azure, and HIPAA-compliant data handling.

questions.question: When was NovaPilot launched and what is it?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaPilot is NovaAI's flagship product, launched in Q3 2022. It is an AI workflow automation platform that integrates with 120+ third-party tools including Salesforce, SAP, and ServiceNow.

questions.question: Compare the NovaLens Professional and Business pricing tiers.
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaLens Professional costs $4,000/month and supports 5 users, 3 data connectors, and monthly model refresh. NovaLens Business costs $12,000/month and supports 20 users, 15 data connectors, weekly model refresh, and custom dashboards.

questions.question: What data connectors does NovaLens support?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaLens supports connectors for Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, Redshift, and PostgreSQL.

questions.question: What is the price and model monitoring limit for NovaGuard Advanced?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaGuard Advanced costs $9,500/month and can monitor up to 20 AI models. It includes daily reports and Slack/PagerDuty integration, and is available via self-serve.

questions.question: What is the price and model limit for NovaGuard Standard?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaGuard Standard costs $3,000/month and can monitor up to 3 AI models. It includes weekly reports and email alerts, and is available via self-serve.

questions.question: What license is NovaBridge released under and how many GitHub stars does it have?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaBridge is open-source and released under the Apache 2.0 license. It has over 4,200 GitHub stars and approximately 800 contributors. The base version is free.

questions.question: What is NovaAI's PTO policy?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaAI has a flexible/unlimited PTO policy. Employees must take a minimum of 15 days per year. PTO requests of 3 or more days must be submitted in Workday at least 5 business days in advance. Sick leave is tracked separately from PTO. NovaAI also provides 11 paid company holidays per year.

questions.question: What are NovaAI's in-office requirements for San Francisco employees?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaAI is hybrid-first. San Francisco-based employees are required to be in the office on Tuesday and Thursday each week. Fully remote arrangements require approval from the direct manager, department VP, and Claudia Torres, and are reviewed annually.

questions.question: What are the expense limits for hotel stays and how must expenses be submitted?
questions.ground_truth_answer: The hotel limit is $350/night in major cities (SF, NYC, London) and $250/night in other cities. All expenses must be submitted through Expensify within 30 days of the expense date. Receipts are required for expenses over $25.

questions.question: How does NovaAI's performance review cycle work?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaAI runs a bi-annual performance review cycle. The mid-year review calibration happens in July with results delivered by July 31. The annual review calibration is in January with results by January 31. Ratings use a 5-point scale (Exceptional, Exceeds Expectations, Meets Expectations, Developing, Unsatisfactory). A rating of Developing or below triggers a PIP within 30 days.

questions.question: What is NovaAI's airfare booking policy?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Airfare must be booked through TravelPerk. Economy class is required for flights under 6 hours. Business class is permitted for flights of 6 hours or more with VP+ approval. Expenses over $5,000 require CFO (Priya Nambiar) approval.

questions.question: What is NovaAI's parental leave policy?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaAI provides 16 weeks of fully paid parental leave for all parents regardless of gender, including both birthing and non-birthing parents.

questions.question: What is the 401(k) match at NovaAI and when are employees eligible?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaAI matches 4% of salary dollar-for-dollar on 401(k) contributions. There is a 6-month eligibility waiting period before employees can participate.

questions.question: What is the annual L&D budget per employee and how does it work?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Each employee receives a $2,500 annual L&D budget, refreshed on January 1. Unused budget does not roll over. Requests must be submitted via the Workday L&D portal.

questions.question: Who is NovaAI's Chief Operating Officer?
questions.ground_truth_answer: James Whitfield is NovaAI's Chief Operating Officer.

questions.question: Which platform does NovaAI use for equity management?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaAI uses Carta as its equity management platform.

hop_chain: 450 Market Street, Suite 1200, San Francisco, CA 94105
questions.question: What is the street address of NovaAI's headquarters?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaAI's headquarters is at 450 Market Street, Suite 1200, with ZIP code 94105.

questions.question: Which provider administers NovaAI's health benefits?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Anthem Blue Cross administers NovaAI's health benefits.

questions.question: When was NovaGuard launched?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaGuard was launched in Q4 2023.

questions.question: When was NovaBridge released?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaBridge was released in March 2024.

questions.question: Which cloud provider does NovaAI use as its secondary provider?
questions.ground_truth_answer: GCP is NovaAI's secondary cloud provider.

questions.question: What is NovaAI's on-call compensation rate?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaAI pays an additional $300 per week for on-call duty.

questions.question: What is NovaAI's home office equipment stipend for new hires?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaAI provides a $1,500 one-time home office equipment stipend upon hire.

questions.question: What health benefits coverage does NovaAI provide?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaAI provides medical, dental, and vision health benefits coverage.

questions.question: Who is the PM owner of NovaAI's flagship product?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Fatima Al-Rashid is the PM owner of NovaPilot, NovaAI's flagship product.

questions.question: Who leads the UX/Design team, and when did they join NovaAI?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Lena Park leads the UX/Design team and joined NovaAI in June 2022.

questions.question: Who leads the SMB Sales team, and what is their FY2026 quota?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Tanya Osei leads the SMB Sales team, and her FY2026 quota is $6M.

questions.question: When did NovaAI's Chief Revenue Officer join the company?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Dominique Leblanc, NovaAI's Chief Revenue Officer, joined the company in June 2022.

questions.question: When did NovaAI's VP of Marketing join the company?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Rachel Huang, NovaAI's VP of Marketing, joined the company in January 2023.

questions.question: Who is NovaBridge's Developer Relations Lead, and to whom do they report?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Priya Osei is NovaBridge's Developer Relations Lead, and she reports to the VP of Marketing.

questions.question: When did NovaAI's VP of Product join the company?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Oliver Haines, NovaAI's VP of Product, joined the company in March 2022.

questions.question: What is the FY2026 NRR target of the department led by NovaAI's VP of Customer Success?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Customer Success, the department led by VP of Customer Success Amara Diallo, has an FY2026 NRR target of 118%.

questions.question: Which product has a roadmap for real-time streaming via Kafka, and what type of product is it?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaLens has a roadmap for real-time streaming via Kafka, and it is a Predictive Analytics Engine.

questions.question: Who leads the Solutions Engineering team, and when did they join NovaAI?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Wei Zhang leads the Solutions Engineering team and joined NovaAI in April 2023.
